acceptance_criteria.reason: src/web/auth-routes.ts constructs the authorization redirect with response_type=code, client_id, redirect_uri, scope, and state; validates code/state before token exchange; and src/eve/sso-auth.ts verifies issuer, audience, and CHARACTER:EVE subject shape.
checks: npm run test -- tests/unit/sso.test.ts tests/unit/auth-routes.test.ts tests/unit/capabilities.test.ts

acceptance_criteria.reason: src/eve/esi-client.ts sends User-Agent and X-Compatibility-Date on every ESI request, scopes private calls to the linked character, and keeps refresh/token handling server-side.
checks: npm run test -- tests/unit/esi-client.test.ts tests/unit/sso.test.ts tests/unit/auth-routes.test.ts tests/unit/capabilities.test.ts

acceptance_criteria.reason: src/eve/esi-client.ts revalidates GET cache entries, retries 420/429/transient 5xx with bounded attempts, and fails closed on X-Pages limit or snapshot drift; tests now cover the Last-Modified snapshot rule and drift failure.
src/eve/capabilities.ts records a fresh capability snapshot and src/eve/esi-client.ts rejects private ESI access when the snapshot is stale or scopes are missing.
checks: npm run test -- tests/unit/esi-client.test.ts tests/unit/sso.test.ts tests/unit/auth-routes.test.ts tests/unit/capabilities.test.ts

acceptance_criteria.reason: docs/RELIABILITY.md and docs/SECURITY.md now match the runtime EVE integration behavior, and the repository build, lint, typecheck, unit, and integration checks all passed in the current state.
checks: npm run test -- tests/unit/esi-client.test.ts tests/unit/sso.test.ts tests/unit/auth-routes.test.ts tests/unit/capabilities.test.ts

commands_run: npm run test -- tests/unit/esi-client.test.ts tests/unit/sso.test.ts tests/unit/auth-routes.test.ts tests/unit/capabilities.test.ts
